title: Sponsorship Evaluation Form - Dependent Children (IMM 5481) - Canada.ca
content:
## Sponsorship Evaluation Form - Dependent Children (IMM 5481)
Sponsorship Evaluation Form - Dependent Children [IMM 5481] (PDF, 2.2 MB)

### How to download, save and open this form
- Use your computer. The form may not open on tablets or mobile phones .
- Save the form on your computer in a place you can remember. For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form. If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- For most Internet browsers, clicking on the link above will automatically download the form.
- If the form doesn’t automatically download, right-click on the link and select “Save as.”
- After you download the form, open it using Adobe Acrobat Reader.

#### Open this form in Acrobat Reader
- Open Acrobat Reader. You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms. Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- You need Acrobat Reader version 10 or higher to open our forms.
- Get the latest version of Acrobat Reader .
- Select “ File ” from the top menu.
- Find the location where you saved the form, click on the file, and click “ Open. ”
Read the step by step instructions on how to complete the form.

### Sponsorship Evaluation (IMM 5481)

#### Who needs to fill out this form?
The sponsor fills out this form if sponsoring only a dependent child who has no
                        dependent children of their own.
If sponsoring a dependent child who has dependent children of their own, fill out the Financial
                        Evaluation (IMM 1283) form instead.
The Sponsorship Evaluation will help us assess your past and current
                            obligations to any sponsorship undertakings you have signed or co-signed. This
                        form, and the supporting documents you send with your application will help us decide if you
                        meet the residency requirement and if you are able to support the applicant.
Quebec residents do not need to fill out this form.
Write your net (after taxes) personal income for the 12 months
                                    before the date of your application. Also write the dates of that 12-month
                                period.
Details of current and past undertakings.
Write the number of people included in undertakings in effect and not yet in effect.
If you have signed undertakings in the past, you must give some details about
                                    them. Follow the instructions on the form and be specific.
Write the number of people you are financially responsible for, but who are not listed in
                                questions 5A and 5B, if it applies to you.
Add the number of people listed in questions 4, 5 and 6. Write the total in the box
                                provided.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
